projects.name: Agent Owner Action Board
projects.current_checkpoint: After the r/ClaudeAI removal, the agent found Cursor Community Forum as the next better-fit visible distribution channel.
projects.blocker: Posting to Cursor Forum requires the owner to use or create an account; the agent prepared the exact topic copy and measurement rule.

owner_actions.where: Cursor Forum Showcase / Built for Cursor
owner_actions.what: Post the prepared Cursor Forum topic from distribution/visible-test-queue.md and provide the public topic URL.
owner_actions.why: Cursor Forum is a better-fit visible channel for agent workflow tools than the failed Reddit/HN attempts.

owner_actions.what: Check repo views, unique visitors, clones, stars, issues, comments, and Cursor Forum replies 24 hours after the Cursor Forum topic is visible.
owner_actions.why: The first demand read should be based on a valid visible exposure window.

next_review.reason: Start the 24-hour read after the Cursor Forum topic is publicly visible
